title: England in huge danger in third Test against NZ | Cricket News
description: England’s deciding Test against New Zealand - and perhaps the future of the hosts’ management - hangs in the balance after a dramatic and fluctuating third day

blocks.text: Cricket update: England in huge danger in third Test against NZ. England’s deciding Test against New Zealand - and perhaps the future of the hosts’ management - hangs in the balance after a dramatic and fluctuating third day at Trent Bridge.
